gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/181)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/181)
text: دَخَلْنَا عَلَيْهِ فَاسْتَدْعَى بِتَمْرٍ فَأَكَلْنَا ثُمَّ ازْدَدْنَا مِنْهُ ثُمَّ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنِّي أُحِبُّ الرَّجُلَ أَوْ قَالَ يُعْجِبُنِي الرَّجُلُ إِذَا كَانَ تَمْرِيّاً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Abu Al Magra, from one of his companions, from Uqba Bin Bashir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘We went over to him<sup>asws</sup>, so he<sup>asws</sup> called for the dates, and we ate them. Then he<sup>asws</sup> increased it for us from it, then said: ‘Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup> said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> love the man’, or said: ‘I<sup>saww</sup> like the man who loves to (eat) the date’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Urn ay r from abu al-Mighra’ from certain persons of his people from ‘Uqbah ibn Bashir who has said the following: “Once we visited abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and he (the Imam) asked for dates which we then ate with him (the Imam), but quite a lot of it. The Imam then said that the Messenger of Allah has said, ‘I like a man who is a man of dates (likes dates).”’
